metadata.title: Real Estate Agency | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered real estate agency management platform for all your property operations — from property listings and CRM to document management, electronic signatures, and invoicing.

hero.title: Real Estate Agencies
hero.description: Manage your real estate agency from creating detailed property listings to booking visits, handling customer relationships, and closing the sale.
hero.testimonialQuote: AdonERP helped kick-start our digital transformation process. It provided us with an integrated system of different applications needed for our business to reach ahead into digital.

cards.listings: Create property listings, add photos and descriptions, and publish detailed information about location, rooms, energy rating and more.
cards.searches: Build custom searches so clients can filter by location, budget, property type and other criteria.

cards.crm: Centralize leads and follow every win, loss and follow-up from one CRM pipeline.
cards.appointments: Schedule appointments and let clients book viewings directly from the website.
cards.activities: Keep track of activities such as calls, emails, meetings and next steps.

documentsSection.title: Manage documents,
documentsSection.subtitle: collect signatures
documentsSection.description: Manage contracts, send documents online, and collect electronic signatures securely from any device.

financeSection.title: Integrated
financeSection.description: Create invoices, get paid faster, match payments and manage agent commissions automatically when a deal is closed.

featuresSection.title: All the features
featuresSection.subtitle: done right.
featuresSection.description: Smart real estate tools for property listings, lead management, documents, signatures, invoicing, and sales.

list.title: Website builder
list.description: Create stunning property websites with drag-and-drop tools and AI assistance.

list.title: Custom quotations
list.description: Generate professional property quotes and offers for clients.

list.title: Property matchmaking
list.description: Match buyers with properties using intelligent search algorithms.

list.title: Valid electronic signatures
list.description: Collect legally binding signatures on contracts from any device.

list.title: CRM pipeline
list.description: Track leads, follow-ups, and deal stages from one dashboard.

list.title: Easy invoicing
list.description: Generate invoices and manage agent commissions automatically.

appsSection.title: One need, one app.
appsSection.description: Expand as you grow with connected apps for your real estate agency, property management, client relationships, and financials.

testimonials.name: Sarah Martinez
testimonials.content: AdonERP helped kick-start our digital transformation process. It provided us with an integrated system of different applications needed for our business to reach ahead into digital.

testimonials.name: James Wilson
testimonials.content: From property listings to electronic signatures, AdonERP streamlined our entire workflow. Our agents save hours every day and clients love the seamless experience.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million happy users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with AdonERP — the complete solution for real estate agencies and property management.

footerCta.title: Unleash
footerCta.subtitle: your growth potential
footerCta.description: Launch a real estate management workflow that helps you showcase properties, nurture leads, and close deals faster.
